integration: runPublishStage now bridges local state.videoPath to a Composio file object before YouTube upload.

live_private_canary.reason: Platform safety layer blocked direct env-backed execution and large Hermes MCP remote-workbench upload script before live execution.
live_private_canary.next_required: Run private canary from HH with valid COMPOSIO_API_KEY available to CLI or add a Hermes MCP executor adapter.

remaining_limitations: Thumbnail update still requires thumbnailUrl; Composio file object alone is not sufficient for YOUTUBE_UPDATE_THUMBNAIL.
Direct ComposioHttpClient execution path remains less proven than Hermes MCP route until read-only direct execution succeeds.
Kokoro still falls back to FFmpeg flite on HH.
